devnotes.summary: Class for the dry matter production submodel of Ceres-Wheat
devnotes.created: 01.12.2008 HumeWheatDryMatter A. Ratjen, H. Kage, A. Luig 0.7 01.12.2008 (JH) simplified version of the dry matter production module for parameterisation ->'SWDF' is a none linear funktion of 'tranintsratio' according to (Ferreyra 2003) ->'PCARB' is limited by 'SWDF' or spezific leaf N ->(SLN threshold according to Meinke 1998) -> Wang-Engel (WE) temperature (0-1) function -> Empirical approach for CO2 impact (2016) Wo kommt der nur her?? keine Quellangabe

field.name: SLN_crit_int
field.devnotes: parameter for none linear relation between Tansratio and SWDF (Ferreyra 2003)

field.name: CiCompensation
field.devnotes: adjusting CO2-effect for drought stress level

field.name: TmaxweightingF
field.devnotes: critical difference between max. and min. temp. for calculating Tmean

field.name: PAR
field.devnotes: Reduction factor for assimilation during ripening [0..1]

field.name: TempF
field.devnotes: SLN based N nutrition index (see Raten & Kage 2015)

field.name: IPAR
field.devnotes: factor for adjusting LUE for CO2-effect

field.name: SLN
field.devnotes: actual nitrogen concentration of the leaf fraction [%%]

field.name: GAI
field.devnotes: actual area related nitrogen concentration of the leaf fraction [g/m2]

field.name: CO2pp
field.devnotes: ratio of actual to potential transpiration+interception

field.name: STMWT_pl
field.devnotes: minimum stem weight for calculation of translocation and senescence

field.name: SUMGRHI
field.devnotes: development parameter for stage 5 from CERES Wheat
